title: Prism Data Block
description: Data source references and inline datasets for a Prism spec.

data.description: Data binding: an external Pulse source, a named dataset reference, inline values, or a synthesized geodata feature collection.

data_source.description: External Pulse data source identified by path or cohort id.

source.description: Pulse source reference (path, cohort id, or archive#shard form).

format.description: Optional hint that overrides the inferred source format.

name.description: Optional logical name used to refer to this binding within the spec.

data_named_ref.description: Reference to a dataset declared in the datasets block, a registry, or a page-level provider.

name.description: Logical dataset name to look up.

data_inline.description: Inline literal dataset; mostly useful for examples and tests.

values.description: Row-oriented array of records. Each record is an object keyed by field name.

items.description: One row of the inline dataset.

name.description: Optional logical name for the inline dataset.

fields.description: Optional explicit field schema for the inline values.

type.description: Pulse-style storage type for the field.

data_feature_collection.description: Synthesized data block: one row per feature in a geodata tier. Used for geoshape basemaps.

tier.description: Geodata tier to materialise as rows. Defaults to world-110m when omitted.

name.description: Optional logical name for the synthesized table.

datasets.description: Map of dataset name to data binding; referenced from elsewhere in the spec by name.
